claim.label: Gross logo churn
claim.raw_text: Gross logo churn was 3.1% for Q4.

evidence.span_text: No quarterly gross logo churn metric was approved for this review cycle.
Enterprise customers Q4 2025 = 126; Q3 2025 = 119 (from ops review). Customer appendix provides period-end customer counts only; no churn, loss, or gross logo churn figure is disclosed.

verdict.rationale: The Q4 2025 operations review explicitly states that no quarterly gross logo churn metric was approved for this review cycle, and the customer appendix discloses only period-end customer counts (not lost-logo data needed to derive gross churn), so no vault span confirms or contradicts the claimed 3.1%.
verdict.suggested_action: Human reviewer should obtain the underlying logo add/loss detail for Q3→Q4 2025 (or the source computation behind 3.1%) since the vault neither reports nor approves this metric.
